'''ân-n-r-h''' ('''kananrehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruffle|ruffle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-n-r-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruffle|ruffle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-n-r-h
|-
! Lemma
| kananrehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinanrehoko|thinanrehoko]] || [[word:jinanrehoko|jinanrehoko]] || [[word:shinanrehoko|shinanrehoko]] || [[word:kinanrehoko|kinanrehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunanrehoko|thuthunanrehoko]] || [[word:jujunanrehoko|jujunanrehoko]] || [[word:shushunanrehoko|shushunanrehoko]] || [[word:kukunanrehoko|kukunanrehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunanrehoko|thunanrehoko]] || [[word:junanrehoko|junanrehoko]] || [[word:shunanrehoko|shunanrehoko]] || [[word:kunanrehoko|kunanrehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonanrehoko|thonanrehoko]] || [[word:jonanrehoko|jonanrehoko]] || [[word:shonanrehoko|shonanrehoko]] || [[word:konanrehoko|konanrehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonanrehoko|thonanrehoko]] || [[word:jonanrehoko|jonanrehoko]] || [[word:shonanrehoko|shonanrehoko]] || [[word:konanrehoko|konanrehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnanrehoko|thĂŠnanrehoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnanrehoko|jĂŠnanrehoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnanrehoko|shĂŠnanrehoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnanrehoko|kĂŠnanrehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathananrehoko|thathananrehoko]] || [[word:jajananrehoko|jajananrehoko]] || [[word:shashananrehoko|shashananrehoko]] || [[word:kakananrehoko|kakananrehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thananrehoko|thananrehoko]] || [[word:jananrehoko|jananrehoko]] || [[word:shananrehoko|shananrehoko]] || [[word:kananrehoko|kananrehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thananrehoko|thananrehoko]] || [[word:jananrehoko|jananrehoko]] || [[word:shananrehoko|shananrehoko]] || [[word:kananrehoko|kananrehoko]]
|}
